calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Purtell, Esq., and James O'Brien, Esq. 415-555-5555, appearing for Josh Miller, Plaintiff and moving party.
David Hunter, Esq., 415-555-5555, appearing fo Defendant
Court reporter: Carol Nygard. CSR #4018. email: carol@nygardreporting.com.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) . The Court stated that this is a motion for attorney's fees and quoted directly from the Graves vs. Los Angeles case. Mr. Purtell stated the request is 174 hours for a total of $78,345.00. Mr. Hunter argued that 15 prior complaints filed from this firm are identical, that this is a cut and paste job and that this is not a complicated case. Mr. Purtell argued that this is not a recycled complaint and provided case background. Mr. O'Brien described his efforts on working on this matter.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $20,700.00 for the reasonable and necessary attorney's fees (23 hours at $900/hour). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
